channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Congress leader seeks all-party dialogue on delimitation bill amid political tensions
item.description: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge has written to Prime Minister Narendra Modi, urging him to call an all-party meeting to discuss the revised Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill, following the governm...

item.title: Exciton-Magnetic Interactions Pave Way for Quantum Technologies
item.description: A groundbreaking study published in Nature Materials highlights significant progress in quantum materials where light and magnetism interact in novel ways. Researchers at the City College of New York,...

item.title: South African Pension Funds Miss Out on Resilient Multifamily Residential Investments
item.description: The article highlights the underrepresentation of multifamily residential properties in South African pension fund portfolios despite their resilience and returns. It notes that institutional portfoli...

item.title: Defense Secretary Teodoro Condemns Racist Video by China Daily Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. condemned a social media video posted by China Daily, a state-run media outlet, which depicted Filipinos as monkeys. The video, circulating on Facebook, mocked t...

item.title: Umahi addresses controversy over nurse's death at his residence
item.description: The article details Governor Umahi's public address regarding the controversy surrounding the death of a nurse at his residence. Umahi denies any foul play, stating the incident was accidental. He exp...

item.title: Philippines Demands Removal of Racist China Daily Video Amid South China Sea Dispute
item.description: The Philippines has formally demanded that Beijing remove a video from the Chinese state media outlet China Daily, which it claims contains racist and inflammatory content regarding their territorial ...

item.title: Nigerians split over VeryDarkMan's traditional title honor
item.description: VeryDarkMan, an activist and social media commentator, received the traditional title 'Atayese I of Nigeria' from the Oluwo of Iwo, Oba Abdulrosheed Adewale Akanbi, sparking mixed reactions online. Wh...

item.title: Seputla Sebogodi: A Legacy of Excellence in South African Entertainment
item.description: The passing of veteran actor Seputla Sebogodi marks the end of an era in South African entertainment. The 63-year-old actor, known for his iconic role as Kenneth Mashaba in the TV series 'Generations,...

item.title: Andy Burnham pledges Labour-led economic reforms as new UK leader
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly elected Labour leader, will outline a transformative agenda for Britain in his first speech as party head. The former Greater Manchester mayor, confirmed as Labour's successor ...

item.title: US strikes Greater Tunb Island to disrupt Iran's naval capabilities in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States conducted a 90-minute bombing campaign on Iran's Greater Tunb Island, targeting coastal defences and cruise missile storage. The island, located near the Strait of Hormuz—a critical ...

item.title: Distraction Theft Incident Involves 88-Year-Old Woman in East Vancouver
item.description: Vancouver police have released video footage of a distraction theft incident involving an 88-year-old woman in East Vancouver. The incident occurred on Tuesday afternoon near Kaslo Avenue and East Has...

item.title: Trump’s Board of Peace scales back Gaza reconstruction to pilot project
item.description: The Gaza reconstruction plan, initially proposed under Donald Trump’s Board of Peace (BoP), has been significantly scaled back. Originally intended to rebuild the entire territory, the project now foc...

item.title: LAPD Investigates Deaths of Twin Toddlers in South L.A. Home
item.description: Authorities are investigating the deaths of twin toddlers found deceased in a South Los Angeles home, with initial reports suggesting a possible drug overdose. The Los Angeles Police Department respon...

item.title: Brush Fire Damages Homes in Eagle Rock During Scorching Heat
item.description: A small brush fire ignited in Eagle Rock on Thursday afternoon, significantly damaging one home and causing damage to two others. The fire, which burned near the 2 Freeway, was reported just after 2 p...

item.title: Wildfire Alert: Pemberton Residents Brace for Increased Fire Activity Amid Dry Lightning Threats
item.description: Residents of Pemberton, British Columbia, are experiencing heightened anxiety as wildfires rage across the region, with many forced to monitor firefighting efforts from their own backyards. The situat...

item.title: British yacht couple reflect on close encounter with Russian warship
item.description: Jane and Alan Kelvey, a retired British couple on a two-month sailing trip, found themselves in an international incident when their 12-metre yacht, Bright Future, encountered a Russian frigate, Admir...

item.title: Darebin Council Area Liquidations List Published for July 16
item.description: The article provides a list of businesses undergoing liquidation within the Darebin Council Area as of July 16. However, the text also includes a technical message from News Corp Australia regarding c...

item.title: Trump Promotes MAGA as Solution to Political Divisions
item.description: The article discusses former President Donald Trump's continued advocacy for the 'Make America Great Again' (MAGA) movement, framing it as a necessary force to address perceived political and social c...

item.title: PM Modi meets Qatar's Amir during visit, discusses legacy of late Emir
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently held a high-level meeting with Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani, the Amir of Qatar, during his official visit to the Gulf nation. The discussion centered around th...

item.title: University of Dar es Salaam Achieves Third Place in East Africa for Graduate Employability
item.description: The University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) has emerged as the third best university in East Africa for graduate employability according to the latest QS World University Rankings. UDSM scored 85.3 in the ...
